name: Jerry Hahn
abstract: Jerry Hahn (born September 21, 1940, Alma, Nebraska) is an American jazz guitarist. Hahn studied at Wichita State University, then moved to San Francisco in 1962, where he played with John Handy (1964–66).

concerts.label: Jazz: The Personal Dimension: Gary Burton Quartet

about_quotes.speaker: Gary Burton
about_quotes.evidence: I had considered several guitar players, and then we started thinking about Chick... I went back to my guitar list, and picked Jerry Hahn, who I had been considering
about_quotes.doc_title: Gary Burton — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
